# MuleSoft Apache Kafka Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (4.14) of Apache Kafka Connector documentation.
> See [Apache Kafka Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Apache Kafka Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Apache Kafka Connector 4.14](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Apache Kafka Connector 4.14 - Additional Configuration Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/latest/kafka-connector-config-topics.md)
- [Integrate Confluent Schema Registry with Kafka Connector - Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/latest/kafka-connector-configure-confluent-example.md)
- [Apache Kafka 4.14 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/latest/kafka-connector-examples.md)
- [Publish and Then Consume a Topic with Kafka Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/latest/kafka-connector-publish-consume-example.md)
- [Apache Kafka Connector 4.14 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/latest/kafka-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Apache Kafka 4.14](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/latest/kafka-connector-studio.md)
- [Troubleshooting Apache Kafka Connector 4.14](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/latest/kafka-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Apache Kafka Connector to 4.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/latest/kafka-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Apache Kafka 4.14 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/kafka-connector/latest/kafka-connector-xml-maven.md)
